summary: Iteration 2 retest of THREE targeted fixes + security regression + smoke. All PASS. Backend: 35/35 pytest (added new query-string-token rejection test — returns 401 as required, header-token still returns 200). Frontend: (1) /buy-objectives.html loads with typeof window.togglePointsDiscount === 'function' and direct invocation returns 'ok' — zero page errors, zero console errors; (2) /admin.html and /admin-mobile.html WITHOUT token show the 🔒 block and do NOT redirect to login.html; (3) with non-admin token both admin pages still show 🔒 block; (4) admin login → /admin.html renders full dashboard, GET /api/admin/stats returns 200; (5) query-string token rejected with 401 while header token unlocks (200); (6) no-token / non-admin-token / admin-token matrix across 10 admin endpoints still passes; no password/rawPasswordPlaintext/rawPassword leakage in /api/admin/users; login rate limit triggers after ≤12 attempts; mobile 390×844 scrollWidth == innerWidth == 390 on /, /buy-coins.html, /buy-sbc.html, /login.html (no horizontal overflow); desktop home + buy-coins CTAs render and are clickable.

ui_bugs.component: Admin dashboard header (admin.html) — cosmetic carryover from iteration 1
ui_bugs.issue: Header still shows hardcoded `admin@trivela.com` label even though logged-in email is `admin@trivela.local`. Not part of the requested retest, but confirmed still present in screenshot.

issues: All pages: scrollWidth == innerWidth == 390 (no horizontal overflow) — PASS

action_items: All three fixes from iteration 2 are verified working. No new action items. (Optional carryover: replace hardcoded admin@trivela.com in admin.html header with the logged-in user's email — LOW priority cosmetic.)
critical_code_review_comments: server.js is still 2113 lines — recommend router split (unchanged from iteration 1).

requireAdmin base64-decodes a raw userId as the token (line 610) — still not signed. Attackers who steal or guess a userId still get full session access. Recommend signed JWTs or opaque server-side sessions (unchanged from iteration 1).
In-memory _loginAttempts rate-limit map resets on process restart and is per-instance — fine for MVP, not distributed-safe (unchanged from iteration 1).
Iteration 2 fix confirmed: req.query.token fallback removed from requireAdmin (line 605-621) — token-in-URL attack vector closed.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all iteration-2 retest items (buy-objectives ReferenceError gone; admin guards show 🔒 without redirect; admin login unlocks dashboard; mobile no overflow)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@trivela.local / Trivela@Admin2026. Non-admin: ephemeral uifetest_<ts>@trivela.test / TestPass!123 registered per-run.
seed_data_creation: None beyond registering one ephemeral non-admin user and one guest order via public API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three iteration-2 fixes verified. Backend has 35 tests total (33 from iter-1 + 2 new query-string-token tests). Run pytest with -n 0 to force serial (pytest.ini pins -n 2 --dist loadscope; rate-limit test can race the admin fixture across workers). If rate-limit was just exercised, restart frontend supervisor (`sudo supervisorctl restart frontend`) before rerunning admin fixture logins so the in-memory rate-limit counter is cleared. External URL: https://preview-project-13.preview.emergentagent.com.

rca of the issue.resolved_togglePointsDiscount: objectivesUI.js line 677 now declares `function togglePointsDiscount() { updatePriceAndSummary(); }` immediately before the `window.togglePointsDiscount = togglePointsDiscount` binding on line 678. Verified: typeof window.togglePointsDiscount === 'function' and a direct call returns without throwing.
rca of the issue.resolved_admin_guard_no_redirect: admin.html:30 and admin-mobile.html:30 now set `window.__adminGuardBlocked = true` inside showBlock() before overwriting documentElement.innerHTML. adminUI.js:30 and admin-mobile.js:25 short-circuit early when __adminGuardBlocked is truthy, so the legacy `window.location.href = '/login.html?redirect=…'` no longer fires when the 🔒 block has already been rendered. Verified: URL remains /admin.html and /admin-mobile.html after 2.5s wait with no token in localStorage.
rca of the issue.resolved_query_string_token_reject: server.js requireAdmin (line 605-621) now reads only `req.headers['authorization']` — the `req.query.token` fallback is gone. Verified: GET /api/admin/stats?token=<adminBase64> returns 401 while GET /api/admin/stats with Authorization: Bearer <adminBase64> returns 200.
